Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Хм. Ну да:
Hmph. Well, let's talk.
You know, there is this special aroma at the swamps at night...
Don't you agree?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Таскаемся:
We're dragging behind that bald monkey all day long...
He probably flushed away by now, and we run in circles!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Что подел: Let it be, brother. That's our job.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Он ведь т: He is bald, too! Cause he is a frog...
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Я сейчас:
I should be with my wife and son now, not here
running round the forest chasing this pitiful human.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Он поправ: He'll get better. Pray and the Sacred Tree will save him.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Болезнь н:
The disease spared no one, why would it spare my son?
Maybe Fagop is right...
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Фагоп дур:
Fagop's a fool. Human machinery is always a waste,
only a fool believes otherwise.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Ладно. Зд: Alright. He's not here for sure. Let's go.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Да уж, у: Yeah, they do have some serious problems.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_А ты прав: Did you really think I made that up?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Я... Слуш:
I... Listen, I... I just don't like the way you do things.
Do you understand?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Я не хочу:
I don't want to be thinking "What if she's messing
with me again?" all the time.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Мне казал:
I thought if I told you right away, you wouldn't have come to 
the Fagop's.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Но ты сде:
But you made it worse!
It's not that I don't give a damn about these kids.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Хотя. кон: Although I don't know them, of course...
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_...а их р:
...and their parents were trying to kill me.
So I shouldn't give a damn...
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Ладно, я: But this isn't what I think!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Ты просто: You just want me not to lie to you from now on?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Кажется,: Seems like we've been here before.
Don't be silly, we went straight ahead.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Вот этот: That's the bush, look. We hid from the watchers here.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Серьезно?: Seriously? This is a totally different one, Eirik.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Наверное:
Maybe for a person who's been to a forest thrice in all his life
all bushes look the same.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Просто по: Just trust me on this. Move.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Не слишко: Isn't it too crowded here for a "safe path"?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Хм. Очеви: Hmph. Obviously it's you who made some noise.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Черт, он: Heck, he's coming right here! Hide!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Да нет же:
Come on, further, he's coming right along the path! 
Crawl in there!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Дьявол! В: Curses! This branch hooked my jacket!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Меригольд: Merigold put her hand on your mouth tight.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Буквально: A spear flew by above your head, literal centimeters away.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Я слышу т: I hear you. And I don't need to see you to hit it.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Отзовись,: Speak, or my next spear will hi-i-it your chest!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_\"Она реш:
(She's gonna chat with him?! What the hell!
He'll kill me! A-ah!)
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Прежде, ч:
Before you could realize it, Merigold flips you over
and jumps on you.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Мэригольд: Merigold? It's you hanging around here again!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Я просто: I was just looking for some ingredients.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_\"А потом: (And then decided to sit on my face...)
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Собираешь: Looking for ingredients? You-u-u still believe in miracles, ha!
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_На свою н:
In your sci-i-ience? What happens, happens.
This wa-a-as the Tree's will. It's time you yeild to it.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Может, ты: Maybe you should stay away from this?
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_\"Боже! Э:
(Gosh! That's oh so nice and all, but I think I'm starting
to suffocate!)
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_А ты не л:
And you, fox, stay away from our swamps! 
Your sly moves won't help you much. 
Quit daydreaming.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_\"Она при:
(She's smothering me... 
I wonder if it counts as a glorious death?)
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_\"С одной:
(On one hand, I'm avoiding the battle, which isn't good.
But on the other hand...)
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Знаешь, в:
You know, there's always a bright side.
Say, if you weren't such a rare species,
I'd apprehend you, for a fraud.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Ты на ред: You are way too chatty for a frog.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Ха. Ладно: Ha. Okay. I have no time for you.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Пусть дре: May the tree lead your way.
dialogs_path_next_to_the_fagop_Нет. Этог: No. Didn't happen. None of that. Got it?
